nodes.label: ICT Awards Nepal Group Photo of Winners on Stage
nodes.description: Group photo of approximately 20 award winners and organizers on a decorated stage at the ICT Awards Nepal, described as 'The Biggest Tech Award of Nepal.' The stage has dramatic stage lighting with green spotlights, trophies, and award banners on either side. The backdrop shows logos of InDrive (presenting sponsor), LWICT, and IFN. Winners are holding certificates and wearing orange scarves/sashes, posing for a group photograph.
